phases.title: Requirements Analysis
phases.description: Analyze the task and define what needs to be built.
steps: Read the shared memory and understand the task
Define user stories with acceptance criteria
Document findings under '## PO Analysis' in shared memory
Include clear handoff: what the architect and designer need to know

phases.title: UX Design
phases.description: Design the user experience based on requirements.
steps: Read the PO analysis and requirements
Design the interaction flow, information architecture, and visual layout
Review language, error messages, and output formatting
Document under '## UX Review' with specific design decisions
Include clear handoff: what the architect needs to consider

phases.title: Architecture Design
phases.description: Design the technical architecture based on requirements and UX.
steps: Read PO analysis and UX design from shared memory
Propose system architecture: components, modules, data flow
Recommend tools, frameworks, libraries with justification
Identify technical risks and mitigation strategies
Document under '## Architecture' with diagrams (text-based) and decisions
Include clear handoff: specific technical guidance for the developer

phases.title: Implementation
phases.description: Implement the feature following the architecture and design.
steps: Read all previous phases in shared memory
Clarify any unclear requirements (ask questions first)
Implement following Clean Code and Data-Oriented Programming principles
Write tests for all new code
Commit with conventional format and release notes
Push to repository
Document under '## Developer Implementation' with file list and decisions

phases.title: CI Verification
phases.description: Verify the build, tests, and deployment readiness.
steps: Run the test suite
Check build and linting
Verify deployment configuration
Document under '## CI Review' with pass/fail status

phases.title: Security Audit
phases.description: Audit the implementation for security vulnerabilities.
steps: Review all changed code for vulnerabilities
Check input validation, injection risks, data safety
Verify secrets and sensitive data handling
Document under '## Security Audit' with findings by severity

phases.title: Quality Assessment
phases.description: Holistic quality review across all dimensions.
steps: Review all previous phase outputs
Assess code, test, and documentation quality
Rate each dimension 1-10
Document under '## QA Report' with scores and recommendations

phases.title: Final Review
phases.description: Final acceptance review by the Product Owner.
steps: Read all phase outputs in shared memory
Verify all acceptance criteria are met
Check that all quality gates passed
Provide final decision: OK Accepted or FAIL Rework needed
Document under '## PO Review'
